validation.connId: Connection ID must be 3-64 letters, digits, - or _

error.databasePasswordInvalid: Stored database credential cannot be decrypted, please reset the password
error.databaseCsvSingleOnly: CSV export supports one table or one query
error.databaseExportReadOnly: Only read SQL can be exported
error.dataJobInterrupted: Database task interrupted by service restart
error.sqlScriptConnectionMismatch: The script does not belong to the current database connection
error.sqlScriptNameDuplicate: A script with this name already exists in the current database

database.searchPlaceholder: Search name, ID, host, database, or creator
database.defaultDatabaseHint: Leave empty to access all databases
database.deleteConfirm: Delete connection {name}? Only connection info is removed.

tabs.empty: No page is open. Select a table/script on the left, or click + to create one.
tabs.noDatabase: Please select or create a database first

schema.dropConfirm: Drop database {name}? All tables and data inside will be removed.
schema.name: Database name

table.truncateConfirm: Truncate table {name}? All rows will be removed, structure kept.
table.name: Table name

export.title: Export
export.multiHint: Multiple results selected; only XLSX/SQLite/SQL supported

jobs.searchPlaceholder: Search job ID, file, connection, error
jobs.submitted: Data job submitted: {id}. Check it in data jobs.

settings.dataJobsDesc: Configure background concurrency and retention for database tasks.

database_data.list_schemas.description: List databases/schemas available through the selected database connection.

database_data.create_schema.description: Create a database/schema on the selected connection. Requires database operate permission.

database_data.list_tables.description: List tables under the selected connection and database/schema.

database_data.create_table.description: Create a table in the selected database/schema from column and index definitions.

database_data.list_columns.description: List column, primary key, default value, and comment metadata for a table.

database_data.table_data.description: Query table rows with pagination, keyword filtering, and single-column ascending or descending sort.

database_data.query_database.description: Run one SQL statement. Read-only SQL requires read permission; write SQL requires operate permission.

database_data.run_script.description: Run multiple SQL statements or a saved script by script_id. Connection ID is required and database name is optional.

database_data.create_row.description: Insert one row into the selected table.

database_data.update_row.description: Update one row by primary key or row locator values.

database_data.delete_row.description: Delete one row by primary key or row locator values.

database_data.table_detail.description: Get columns, primary key, and index metadata for a table.

database_data.delete_table.description: Delete the selected table and its data. Requires database operate permission.

database_data.alter_table.description: Modify column and index structure for the selected table.

database_data.truncate_table.description: Remove all rows from the selected table while keeping its structure.

database_data.alter_schema.description: Update options such as charset or collation for a database/schema.

database_data.delete_schema.description: Delete the selected database/schema and all objects inside it.

database_transfer_jobs.submit_export.description: Submit an asynchronous database export job for tables, query results, or multiple query results.

database_transfer_jobs.submit_import.description: Upload a file and submit an asynchronous database import job. Supports CSV, XLSX, SQLite, and SQL.

database_transfer_jobs.list_database_tra.description: Page through database tasks with keyword, connection, kind, status, creator, and created-at sorting filters.

database_transfer_jobs.database_transfer.description: Count completed but undownloaded database export jobs for the current user, optionally scoped to a database connection.

database_transfer_jobs.get_database_tran.description: Get status, file, row count, and expiration details for one database task.

database_transfer_jobs.delete_database_t.description: Delete one database task and its file.

database_transfer_jobs.download_database.description: Download a completed database export file. After the stream finishes, the file is cleaned up and marked as downloaded.

sql_scripts.get_sql_script.description: Get one SQL script with content, ID, created time, updated time, and statement count.

common.database: Database/schema name. Leave empty to use the connection default or current connection scope.
common.name: Database/schema name.
common.status: Job status: pending, running, success, or failed.
common.created_by: Creator filter: me for yourself, others for other users.
common.sort_order: Created-at sort order: ascend or descend.
common.include_total: Whether to return an exact total. Set false on large tables to skip COUNT(*) for faster first paint.
common.mode: Import mode: append, overwrite, or upsert.
common.create_table: Whether to create the target table during import.

property.total_exact: Whether total is an exact count.
property.script_id: Saved SQL script ID to run.
